title: Visible String
description: Makes the String Model wider and the String Texture more Visible so you can see it
body:
I was building Clouds out of String with Carpet on top to let Rain still fall through but was having trouble seeing the String so I made this.
![String Cloud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6df2ba82b2b30c0aea04b6c2efc557adce9ff4.png)
It is helpful for building with string
![Sugarcane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/305e28c8527aa243ac64a718929c31a1b9251c58.png)
Kinda ruins traps though...
![Jungle Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e68d18c02bff2687bf4da0d9c154a0f603c33281.png)
![Random String](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63511686b4735999879ccc826f59faa118d07c12.png)
Good for writing Hidden Messages since you can't see it normally
![HELLO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb557a554f2e6122f5eff3922a7462817b61538.png)
